title: Software directory entry
description: Validates entries in software/entries.json. Fields are deliberately durable: no pricing, no feature inventories. See software/README.md.

primary_use.description: One sentence: the job this tool does.

notable_strength.description: One durable, defensible strength. No superlatives you can't support.

verify_before_use.description: The trade-off or question a user should verify directly with the vendor.

license.description: Coarse licensing posture. These buckets are deliberately not interchangeable: open-source (OSI-style license), source-available (visible source, restricted use — e.g. fair-code), open-weight (model weights downloadable, license may restrict), proprietary-free-tier (closed source with a usable free tier), proprietary (closed source, paid), mixed (meaningfully different licenses across components). Verify the exact license directly before adoption.

source_repository.description: Official public source repository URL, when one exists.

last_reviewed.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) a maintainer last reviewed this entry's fields against official sources.

review_status.description: verified = fields checked against official sources on last_reviewed date; needs-review = flagged for re-verification.

tags.description: Lowercase slugs for cross-cutting traits (e.g. local-first, self-hostable).
